#!/bin/bash

curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-d '{
    "user_id": "curl-tester",
    "session_id": "test-session-123",
    "input": {
        "text": "Hi ChatBot, can you suggest a classic gin cocktail?"
    },
    "metadata": {
        "platform": "backend"
    }
}'

curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-d '{
    "user_id": "curl-tester",
    "session_id": "test-session-123",
    "input": {
        "text": "Okay, I also have these things. What can I make now?",
        "image": {
            "url": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"
        }
    },
    "metadata": {
        "platform": "backend"
    }
}'
